name: Edit Tags Button
notes: The 🏷️ button appears on every document card (grid view, line 879-885) and every list row (list view, lines 925-930); both call the same handler.
onClick uses e.stopPropagation() to prevent the card/row click-to-select handler from also firing.
Opening the modal is pure client-side state: tagEditorVisible, tagEditorDocId, tagEditorTags are set without any API call.
Saving calls PUT /api/documents/{id}/tags and on success updates the documents array in local state — no full page reload.
